ToolboxElements.Name: Expression In Brackets
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches any text enclosed in round brackets.

ToolboxElements.Name: Letters And Umlauts
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches sequences of letters including German umlauts.

ToolboxElements.Name: Does Not Contain Pattern
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches input strings that do not contain the specified pattern.

ToolboxElements.Name: Absolute And Relative URLs
ToolboxElements.Description: Extracts values from href/src attributes (absolute or relative URLs).

ToolboxElements.Name: HTML/XML Tag
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches text enclosed within angle brackets (basic tag match).

ToolboxElements.Name: Relative URL
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches relative URLs that are not absolute or Windows paths.

ToolboxElements.Name: Pattern With Conditions
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches content between defined start and end patterns.

ToolboxElements.Name: Pattern Between Conditions
ToolboxElements.Description: Extracts content between start and end patterns using lookarounds.

ToolboxElements.Name: Postal Code (5 Digits)
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches 5-digit postal codes (e.g., German ZIP codes).

ToolboxElements.Name: Valid Relative URL
ToolboxElements.Description: Validates that a path is a relative URL.

ToolboxElements.Name: Extract Text From HTML Tag
ToolboxElements.Description: Extracts the inner text of an HTML/XML tag.

ToolboxElements.Name: Area Code
ToolboxElements.Description: Matches telephone area codes with 4–7 digits.
